emails.subject: The reason your [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] keeps coming back (Irvine patients are learning this)
emails.preview: Most doctors miss this one thing...
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

If you've been dealing with [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] for months — or years — and conventional medicine hasn't given you a clear answer, there's something our patients at Restoration Healthcare hear all the time that changes everything:

Symptoms aren't the problem. They're the signal.

Here's what that means in practice: when we see patients with persistent [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM], we look upstream. We run comprehensive labs most standard doctors don't order — DUTCH hormone panels, GI-MAP stool analysis, heavy metal testing, organic acids — because in integrative and functional medicine, the goal isn't to quiet the symptom. It's to find what's actually driving it.

Our team includes Dr. Sunny Raleigh (DO, Medical Director), Dr. Michael Palladino (ND, complex chronic illness), Dr. Anna Emanuel (MD, double board-certified), and Dr. Walid Faraj (DO, integrative medicine). Four practitioners. One mission: restore your body's ability to heal from within.

If you're in the Irvine or Orange County area and you're ready to get real answers — not just another prescription — we'd love to see you as a new patient.

Book your new patient visit below. We're accepting new patients now.

To your restoration,
The Team at Restoration Healthcare
(949) 523-1987

emails.subject: Why detox binders work (and why most people use them wrong)
emails.preview: The sequence matters more than the supplement.
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

One of the most common questions we get from patients dealing with [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] — especially those who've tried detox protocols before — is about binders.

Detox binders are compounds that physically bind to toxins, heavy metals, and biotoxins in the gut, helping your body eliminate them rather than reabsorb them. Think activated charcoal, fulvic acid, bentonite clay, chlorella — each with different binding affinities for different compounds.

Here's where it gets nuanced: binders are only effective when used in the right sequence, at the right dose, for the right target toxin. Using a binder without knowing what you're binding — or without supporting your drainage pathways first — is like trying to sweep debris without opening a window.

At Restoration Healthcare in Irvine, we use advanced lab testing to identify what's actually in your system before recommending a protocol. Our physicians — including Dr. Michael Palladino, ND, who specializes in complex chronic illness and detoxification — design individualized programs based on your specific lab results.

This is different from a generic detox kit. It's a medical protocol, designed for your body.

If you've been curious about whether detox could be part of your healing, let's find out together.

To your restoration,
The Team at Restoration Healthcare

emails.subject: What happened when [FIRST_NAME] stopped guessing and started testing
emails.preview: Real patient story from our Irvine clinic.
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

We want to share a story from our Irvine clinic. (Details changed to protect privacy. Individual results vary and are not guaranteed.)

A patient — let's call her Maria — came to us after three years of unexplained fatigue, brain fog, and recurring digestive issues. She'd seen five specialists. Had normal bloodwork each time. Was told it was stress.

Our team ran a different set of tests: an organic acids panel, GI-MAP stool analysis, and heavy metals urine test. Results showed elevated mycotoxins, a dysbiotic gut microbiome, and suboptimal B12 and glutathione levels — none of which appeared on her standard panels.

Over six months, we implemented a structured detoxification protocol, gut restoration program, and targeted IV therapy. Maria reports feeling 'like a different person.' Her energy returned. The brain fog cleared. Digestion normalized.

Again — results like Maria's are not typical and cannot be guaranteed. Every patient's biology is different. But this is what functional medicine is designed to do: find what conventional testing misses and address it systematically.

If you're in Irvine or Orange County and you're tired of being told 'everything looks fine' when you know something isn't — we're here.

We're accepting new patients. Book your first visit today.

To your restoration,
Dr. Sunny Raleigh & The Restoration Healthcare Team
